DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY D/B/A AT&T'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF ULYSSES ENRILES FURTHER ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS: MOTION DENIED IN PART; GRANTED IN PART. THE AMENDED RESPONSES SERVED ON AUGUST 17, 2020 ARE SUFFICIENT. DEFENDANTS CAN FOLLOW UP FOR MORE INFORMATION EITHER THROUGH DEPOSITIONS OR OBTAINING THE MEDICAL RECORDS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $100 AWARDED TO DEFENDANTS SINCE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLETE RESPONSES WERE NOT SERVED UNTIL AFTER THIS MOTION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY D/B/A AT&T'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF ULYSSES ENRILES FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS: MOTION GRANTED IN PART; DENIED IN PART. THE AMENDED RESPONSES SERVED ON AUGUST 17, 2020 ARE SUFFICIENT. PLAINTIFF HAS STATED SHE DOES NOT HAVE (OR CANNOT LOCATE) THE DIGITAL OR ELECTRONIC COPIES OF THE PHOTOS. IF THE DIGITAL COPIES ARE EVENTUALLY FOUND, THEY ARE ORDERED TO BE PRODUCED. SANCTIONS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ulysses Enriles Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY D/B/A AT&T's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ulysses Enriles Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions:

Motion denied in part; granted in part. The amended responses served on August 17, 2020 are sufficient. Defendants can follow up for more information either through depositions or obtaining the medical records. Sanctions in the amount of $100 awarded to Defendants since Plaintiff's complete responses were not served until after this motion was filed.

Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ulysses Enriles Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY D/B/A AT&T's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ulysses Enriles Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions:

Motion granted in part; denied in part. The amended responses served on August 17, 2020 are sufficient. Plaintiff has stated she does not have (or cannot locate) the digital or electronic copies of the photos. If the digital copies are eventually found, they are ordered to be produced. Sanctions denied.

Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
